description_long: This object is a small, cylindrical brown glass bottle with a black screw cap and a built-in dropper, commonly used for dispensing liquid medicine. The front label displays the product name 'CBD' in large letters, along with dosage information and branding details in gold and white text. The bottle's side and back labels provide supplement facts, usage instructions, and additional product information, including a barcode. The dropper top is made of black plastic with a soft, gray rubber bulb for extracting and dispensing the liquid inside. The overall design is sleek and professional, with a focus on health and wellness branding. The bottle is compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or pocket.
description: A small brown glass bottle with a black dropper cap, labeled for CBD liquid medicine. The bottle features gold and white branding and detailed supplement information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'CBD' prominently displayed, dosage details, and branding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the supplement facts and part of the label text, with the dropper cap visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more detailed product information, a barcode, and the back of the bottle.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting icons or symbols on the label and the barcode at the bottom.
